name: WORLD HEALTH ENERGY HOLDINGS, INC.
business: World Health Energy Holdings provides cybersecurity and telecom services. It offers cybersecurity software for businesses (OTGRAPH) and consumers (parental system), and operates a mobile virtual network operator in Poland through its subsidiary CrossMobile. It also develops AI-based behavioral analysis solutions.

exposures.sentence: World Health Energy Holdings ( WHEN or the Company or us ) is primarily engaged in the global telecom and cybersecurity technology field.

Through our majority owned Polish based subsidiary, CrossMobile Sp z o.o., ... we operate a mobile virtual network operator (MVNO) in Poland, which is also licensed to provide telecom services throughout Europe.

OTOGRAPH was developed based on based on a state of the art intelligence technology combined with AI technology that processes and analyzes massive amounts of behavioral and communication data and enables organizations to make real time accurate preventive assessments and decisions to protect company assets and ensure operational efficiency.

IHQ Invested and granted to us a worldwide, royalty-free, perpetual, nonexclusive, sublicensable, irrevocable license to IHQ’s Edge SDK, in both source-code and object-code formats and associated documentation (collectively, the Perpetual License ).
Instaview is engaged in the field of image processing systems and thermal cameras.

catalysts.event: Uplisting of common stock on NYSE, NASDAQ or CBOE
catalysts.sentence: Under the terms of the Agreement, we undertook to complete an uplisting (the Uplisting ) of its shares of Common Stock on NYSE, NASDAQ or the Chicago Board Options Exchange prior to June 28, 2025 (the Uplisting Target Date ).

catalysts.event: Initiation of third step to expand combined Cyber Care and Mobile Telecom to new markets
catalysts.sentence: The third step expected to be initiated by the second quarter of 2026 in is to copy and paste the same scenario of combining Cyber Care and Mobile Telecom to other selected markets in North Africa, the USA and Europe.

catalysts.event: CrossMobile brand building within next 12 months
catalysts.sentence: CrossMobile intends during the next 12 months to build a strong telecom brand empowered by state of the art technology, competitive pricing and a product mix including proprietary AI and WHEN’s cybersecurity solutions, being the core of the value added strategy.

catalysts.event: Mutual option to acquire additional shares of Terra Zone
catalysts.sentence: In addition, the parties agreed to a mutual option, exercisable by either of the parties through the second anniversary of closing, to acquire additional shares of the other.

catalysts.event: Target Fundraise period for marketing advisory fee
catalysts.sentence: In the event that the Company or a subsidiary will raise funds on or prior to December 28, 2025 (the Target Fundraise Period ) in connection with, from or relating to the Uplisting (whether or not the Uplisting ultimately occurs) for a specified amount (the Target Fundraise ), the Company is obligated to pay IHQ a marketing advisory fee at a specified the rate for each dollar cumulatively raised during the Target Fundraise Period over and above the Target Fundraise.

tamClaims.claim: Global telecom services market size of $172.32 billion in 2023, growing at 6.2% CAGR through 2030
tamClaims.sentence: The global telecom services market size was valued at USD $172.32 billion in 2023 and is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.2% from 2023 to 2030

tamClaims.claim: Global cybersecurity market size projected to grow from $X billion in 2023 to $424.97 billion in 2030, at 4.51% CAGR
tamClaims.sentence: The global cyber security market size is projected to grow from billion in 2023 to $424.97 billion in 2030, at a CAGR of 4.51% 2 during the forecast years.

tamClaims.claim: Smartwatch users worldwide of 323.99 million in 2023, expected to increase to 740.53 million by 2029
tamClaims.sentence: As of 2023, there were 323.99 million smartwatch users worldwide, according to scoop.market.us. This number is expected to increase to 740.53 million by 2029 https://scoop.market.us/smart-wearables-statistics/.
